title: Where Your {{investment}} Goes
subtitle: Every pound deployed on Day 1 of reopening — no funds held in reserve outside the business
bannerNote: VAT on startup costs (~£6,500) reclaimed in Q1 — credited against first HMRC VAT return (August 2026)

rent.label: Rent in Advance (3 months)
rent.desc: Three months rent paid up front to the landlord — covers May, Jun, Jul 2026 at the contractual 15% of 2025 turnover rate. No deposit required. From August 2026 rent reverts to 15% of actual quarterly turnover (variable, scales with trading).

hardware.label: Hardware from Liquidators
hardware.desc: Physical bar & kitchen equipment (£20,000 + VAT) — purchased at liquidation pricing. Operational on Day 1.

ip.label: IP License Fee
ip.desc: One-off licensing fee paid to No Dice Bars LTD. Grants indefinite use of the Plonk name. No Dice Bars LTD will handle all online sales campaigns and maintenance for an ongoing commission fee, replacing the old bookings company Design My Night. See the Plonk tab for more info.

stock.label: Stock & Operational Setup
stock.desc: Itemised £3,000 — alcohol stock, software subs (Xero, Rota Cloud, Google), internet, cleaning restart. Detail below.

working.label: Working Capital Buffer
working.desc: Staged into business per cash flow model. Covers early trading runway before revenue covers costs.

setup.title: £5,400 Day-1 Operations Breakdown
setup.subtitle: Opening stock, contracts, 3-month subscription pre-pays, and pre-trading regulatory costs so the venue trades from Day 1

stock.title: Opening Stock
stock.subtitle: Drink + bar consumables for Day 1 trading

contracts.title: Setup & Activation
contracts.subtitle: Deep clean, kit setup, supplier deposits

alcohol.label: Alcohol stock (opening fill)
alcohol.note: Wines, spirits, beer for Day 1 trading

soft.label: Soft drinks, mixers & non-alcohol
soft.note: Mixers, juices, soft drinks opening fill

cleaning.label: Cleaning contracts restart
cleaning.note: Deep clean + first month commercial cleaning

app.label: App & booking platform setup
app.note: Plonk Golf booking + delivery app integrations

insurance.label: Insurance premium (annual)
insurance.note: Combined liability + contents — annual premium paid up-front before opening (VAT-exempt)

rates.label: Business rates (first month)
rates.note: First month UK business rates due before opening — Southwark Council, post-relief (VAT-exempt)

licence.label: Alcohol licence change (DPS)
licence.note: Designated Premises Supervisor change fee — Southwark Licensing (VAT-exempt)

hardware.title: £20,000 ex VAT  ·  £24,000 inc VAT
hardware.subtitle: Bar, mini golf, arcade and consumables purchased from liquidation at distressed pricing

minigolf.label: Mini golf course
minigolf.note: Holes, putting surfaces, course fittings & feature props

barEquip.label: Bar equipment across site
barEquip.note: Beer lines, fridges, glasswash, bar tops, taps, ice machine, POS hardware (£8,000)

wetStock.label: Wet stock consumables & tools
wetStock.note: Glassware, cleaning chemicals, repair tools, hand-trolleys, small wares

arcade.label: Arcade machines, furniture & fittings
arcade.note: Arcade cabinets, pool tables, board game stock, seating, lighting fittings (£6,000)
